name: Familial Status
description: Whether a household includes children under 18, a pregnant person, or a person seeking custody of a minor. Protected class under US FHA.
excludes: Marital status — separately regulated under ECOA for credit
guidance: Familial status targeting in housing ads is per se illegal under FHA unless the property qualifies for the senior-housing exemption. Exclusion of families with children is a specifically named violation in HUD v. Facebook.
